hero.title: Join our journey
hero.subtitle: Working with us is more than just a job. Want to come along for the ride?

about.heading: What we do
about.body: We're a small team on a mission to build great products – and along the way, we're championing a more human way to work. We started with a simple idea and have grown into a suite of tools serving thousands of customers.

stats.heading: Where will I work?
stats.body: Buffer is a fully remote team, spread across the whole planet. We have teammates in 22 countries, 51 cities, and 11 timezones (and counting!). As a member of our team, you will be invited to work wherever you're happiest and most productive.
stats.link: More about how we work remotely

values.heading: United by our values
values.card1Desc: We choose transparency as a lifestyle of authenticity and honesty, and as an effective way to work remotely and build trust.
values.card2Desc: We strive to be better every day – not in competition with anyone but our yesterday selves.
values.card3Desc: We remove ourselves from our work to lead to a better, more productive experience for everyone. We're all rowing this boat together.
values.card4Desc: We regularly show gratitude for each other, for the technology that makes our work possible, and for the blessings in our lives.
values.card5Desc: We approach the future with positivity while embracing hard conversations in service of our long-term health.
values.card6Desc: We carve out time for reflection. We believe personal growth stems from vulnerability and introspection.

team.heading: What is the team like?
team.body: We're an equal opportunity employer and we're united by our values. We celebrate unique differences and hire talented people from a wide variety of backgrounds. We're committed to a work environment of respect and kindness.

perks.heading: Perks and benefits
perks.card1Desc: Compensation that adjusts to your cost of living and experience.
perks.card2Desc: Live and work wherever you're happiest and most productive.
perks.card3Desc: Four workdays with a flexible fifth day for overflow or personal time.
perks.card4Desc: Health coverage for all team members.
perks.card5Desc: Budget to set up your home office.
perks.card6Desc: Take the time you need to rest and recharge.

roles.heading: Open roles
roles.emailHeading: Be the first to know about new roles.
